summary: Hotel Admin Portal Testing COMPLETE. Backend: 12/12 API tests passed. Frontend: All 9 test scenarios passed. Hotel portal has login, dashboard with stats/chart/kiosks, bookings with filters/search/export, revenue with breakdown, sidebar navigation, and auth guard.

issues: React hydration warnings in console due to <span> elements inside <select>, <option>, <tbody>, <tr> - cosmetic warning from Emergent preview system wrapper elements, does NOT affect functionality

hotel_auth.test_login_success: PASS - Login with admin@bristol.fr works, returns token, user, hotel info
hotel_auth.test_alt_hotel_login: PASS - Login with admin@negresco.fr works for Hotel Negresco Nice

hotel_dashboard.test_dashboard_returns_data: PASS - Returns hotel_name, commission_rate, bookings_today, total_revenue, kiosks, monthly_chart

hotel_bookings.test_bookings_returns_array: PASS - Returns bookings with hotel_commission, zont_commission, driver_amount calculated

hotel_export.test_export_with_token_query_param: PASS - Returns CSV file with booking data

hotel_profile.test_profile_returns_hotel_data: PASS - Returns hotel name and city

frontend_tests.hotel_login_page: PASS - data-testid='hotel-login-page', French text 'Espace Hotel', form elements present
frontend_tests.hotel_login_flow: PASS - Login with admin@bristol.fr / hotelc9baf685 redirects to /hotel dashboard

hotel_dashboard.header: PASS - Shows 'Bonjour, Hotel Le Bristol Paris'
hotel_dashboard.stat_cards: PASS - 4 cards (Reservations aujourd'hui, Reservations ce mois, CA genere, Commission totale)
hotel_dashboard.monthly_revenue: PASS - Shows 'REVENU MENSUEL' with CA ce mois, Votre commission, evolution %
hotel_dashboard.revenue_chart: PASS - 'EVOLUTION DES REVENUS' bar chart showing monthly data
hotel_dashboard.kiosks_section: PASS - 'VOS BORNES TACTILES' showing Borne Lobby status 'En ligne'

hotel_sidebar.nav_items: PASS - Dashboard, Reservations, Revenus nav links present
hotel_sidebar.user_info: PASS - Shows user name 'Jean Martin' and email 'admin@bristol.fr'

hotel_bookings_page.summary_cards: PASS - Shows Reservations (15), CA genere (2,300 EUR), Votre commission (345 EUR)
hotel_bookings_page.status_filter: PASS - data-testid='hotel-booking-filter-status' dropdown with status options
hotel_bookings_page.period_filter: PASS - data-testid='hotel-booking-filter-period' dropdown with date ranges
hotel_bookings_page.sort_toggle: PASS - 'Par date'/'Par prix' sort button works
hotel_bookings_page.bookings_table: PASS - Columns: Date, ID, Service, Trajet, Prix, Commission, Statut

hotel_revenue_page.header: PASS - Shows 'Revenus' with subtitle 'Suivi de vos commissions et revenus mensuels'
hotel_revenue_page.stat_cards: PASS - 4 cards: CA total genere, Commission totale, Reservations totales, Evolution %
hotel_revenue_page.monthly_comparison: PASS - 'COMPARAISON MENSUELLE' with Mois en cours vs Mois precedent
hotel_revenue_page.monthly_breakdown: PASS - 'DETAIL PAR MOIS' table with Mois, Reservations, CA, Votre commission

frontend_tests.auth_guard: PASS - Navigating to /hotel without login redirects to /hotel/login

critical_code_review_comments: React hydration warnings appear in console due to Emergent preview system wrapper elements - these are cosmetic and do NOT affect functionality
All data-testid attributes correctly implemented for testing
Commission calculations are mathematically correct (hotel_commission + zont_commission + driver_amount = total_price)
All text is in French as requested
Auth guard properly redirects unauthenticated users to /hotel/login
CSV export works with token query parameter for window.open download
seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded demo data: 15 bookings for Hotel Le Bristol Paris with commission calculations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hotel Admin Portal fully tested. Login at /hotel/login, Dashboard at /hotel, Bookings at /hotel/bookings, Revenue at /hotel/revenue. Each hotel admin only sees their own data. Sidebar has Dashboard, Reservations, Revenus nav items plus logout. All text in French. Demo hotels: Le Bristol Paris (15% commission), Negresco Nice (12% commission). React hydration warnings in console are from Emergent preview system, not actual bugs.

mocked_api.note: All APIs are real, hitting MongoDB with hotel bookings and kiosk data
